section_name: Issuance and Placement of License Plate
text:
(a) On payment of the prescribed fee, an applicant for motor vehicle registration shall be issued a license plate or set of plates.

(b) Subject to Section 504.901 (Transfer and Removal of License Plates) , the department shall issue only one license plate or set of plates for a vehicle during the registration period set by rule.

(c) The board may adopt rules regarding the placement of license plates for a motor vehicle, road tractor, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.010 — Issuance and Placement of License Plate

(a) On payment of the prescribed fee, an applicant for motor vehicle registration shall be issued a license plate or set of plates.

(b) Subject to Section 504.901 (Transfer and Removal of License Plates) , the department shall issue only one license plate or set of plates for a vehicle during the registration period set by rule.

(c) The board may adopt rules regarding the placement of license plates for a motor vehicle, road tractor, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 175, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Subject to Section 504.901 (Transfer and Removal of License Plates) , the department shall issue only one license plate or set of plates for a vehicle during the registration period set by rule.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The board may adopt rules regarding the placement of license plates for a motor vehicle, road tractor, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer.
